docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARREN PARKER, MIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 1177 MARKET STREET LLC PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDER OF PROOF. JUDMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MIA WARREN PARKER PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1177 MARKET STREET LLC IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY WARREN PARKER, MIA AS TO DEFENDANT 1177 MARKET STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
